customizations.reason: Superpowers provides intermediate code reviews via requesting-code-review skill. No need for duplicate general reviewer.
Plugin has its own workflow documentation in extended-dev-workflow skill.

Original phase 5 (implementation) replaced with superpowers:writing-plans → subagent-driven-dev TDD execution. Original phase 6 (quality review) replaced with /deep-review. Phase 7 simplified to use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch.
Superpowers provides intermediate code reviews. Deep-review focuses on specialized agents only.
Plugin has its own workflow documentation.

customizations.summary: Renamed review-pr to deep-review, removed code-reviewer from available agents
customizations.reason: Renamed for clarity in extended workflow. Reduced from 6 to 5 agents — code-reviewer excluded (custom-04). Added integration docs showing how deep-review fits as Phase C.
Original referenced logForDebugging, logError, logEvent, Statsig, Sentry, constants/errorIds.ts. Generalized to work with any project's logging/monitoring conventions via CLAUDE.md.
Original hardcoded ES modules, function keyword preference, React patterns, explicit return types. Now defers to project's own CLAUDE.md standards.
New skill that documents how feature-dev discovery, superpowers execution, and deep-review validation connect into a unified flow.
